pageContext.name: Harley Quinn
pageContext.description: She's dying to save the world! You can join Harley Quinn's craziest mission yet with this 7.5-inch vinyl figure inspired by her appearance in 2021's The Suicide Squad. Stylish and beautiful, with a strong hint of danger, this vinyl collectible captures everything you love about Harley.  Designed by Pedro Astudillo and sculpted by Anders Ehrenborg, it comes packaged inside a display-worthy window box.
